def toBoundedBilin {C : ℝ} (f : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)
  --(hf_bounded : ∀ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C) (hf_measurable : @Measurable _ _ (borel (spectrum ℂ a)) _ f)
  : H →L⋆[ℂ] H →L[ℂ] ℂ where
  toFun x := {  toFun y := (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
                map_add' := by
                  intro y z
                  simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try ring

                    have h₁ : Continuous fun y : H => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a)) := by
                      sorry

                    have h₃ : Continuous (fun y : H => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a)).integral f) := by

                  exact h

def toBoundedBilin {C : ℝ} (f : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)
  --(hf_bounded : ∀ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C) (hf_measurable : @Measurable _ _ (borel (spectrum ℂ a)) _ f)
  : H →L⋆[ℂ] H →L[ℂ] ℂ where
  toFun x := {  toFun y := (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
                map_add' := by
                  intro y z
                  simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try ring
                  <;>
                  try simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try ring
                map_smul' := by
                  intro r y
                  simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try ring
                  <;>
                  try simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try ring
                cont := by
                  have h : Continuous fun y : H => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f := by
                    have h₁ : Continuous fun y : H => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a)) := by
                      -- prove that the map y ↦ E_{a, x, y} is continuous
                      sorry
                    have h₂ : Continuous fun m : MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a) => m.integral f := by
                      -- prove that the integral is continuous with respect to the measure
                      sorry
                    have h₃ : Continuous (fun y : H => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a)).integral f) := by
                      -- compose the two continuous maps
                      apply Continuous.comp h₂ h₁
                    -- use the fact that the composition is continuous
                    exact h₃
                  exact h
              }
  map_add' := by
    intro x y
    ext z
    simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
    <;>
    try norm_num
    <;>
    try ring
    <;>
    try simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
    <;>
    try norm_num
    <;>
    try ring
  map_smul' := by
    intro r x
    ext z
    simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
    <;>
    try norm_num
    <;>
    try ring
    <;>
    try simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
    <;>
    try norm_num
    <;>
    try ring
  cont := by
    have h : Continuous fun x : H => (fun y : H => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f) := by
      have h₁ : Continuous fun x : H => (fun y : H => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))) := by
        -- prove that the map x ↦ (y ↦ E_{a, x, y}) is continuous
        sorry
      have h₂ : Continuous fun m : MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a) => m.integral f := by
        -- prove that the integral is continuous with respect to the measure
        sorry
      have h₃ : Continuous (fun x : H => (fun y : H => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a)).integral f)) := by
        -- compose the two continuous maps
        apply Continuous.comp h₂
        exact h₁
      -- use the fact that the composition is continuous
      exact h₃
